title: The Otherworldly Heroic Tale of the Only One Who Can See Levels
description: Itsuki, a college student, suddenly finds himself in another world, where he is captured by bandits and sold into slavery. On top of that, his only abilities are the power to see his own condition and that of others—and his immunity to pain! A high-stakes life in another world begins now!
author: Heisei Owari
